objective: Built a customer app with a JSON-driven layout that made it endlessly customizable, and a vendor app focused on giving sellers a fast, effortless way to run their store. Extended into mobile HR and project management too, with generative AI features that made daily work quicker.

Built real estate and e-commerce apps that took users from browsing to checkout without friction, with in-app video calling that let buyers and sellers connect face to face. Added an offline mode that kept everything working on weak internet and synced the moment users reconnected, making the apps dependable even in low-signal areas.

Turned design ideas into smooth, easy-to-use apps that felt natural across devices, with real-time location tracking that warned users about risky areas from community reviews to help them stay safe. Built instant chat that kept people connected and coming back to the app.
